title: Which Faculty is in Which Campus?
content:
Which Faculty is in Which Campus?

Which Faculty is in Which Campus?

With our campuses located in Üsküdar, the heart of Istanbul, which brings together different civilizations and continents, Üsküdar University has an easily accessible location from every point of the city. With the recently opened NP Health Campus in Ümraniye, students are offered a higher education experience intertwined with urban life with the understanding of

"one university five campuses"

. So which Faculty and which School is located on which Campus?

Faculty of Engineering and Natural Sciences

Main Campus A Block

Vocational School of Health Services

(Emergency and Disaster Management, Operating Room Services, Anesthesia, Biomedical Device Technology, Environmental Health, Child Development, Child Protection and Care Services, Dialysis, Pharmacy Services, Electroneurophysiology, Disability Care and Rehabilitation, Home Patient Care, Physiotherapy, Food Technology, First and Emergency Aid, Occupational Health and Safety, Laboratory Technology, Nuclear Technology and Radiation Safety, Opticianry, Orthopedic Prosthetics and Orthotics, Autopsy Assistant, Pathology Laboratory Techniques, Radiotherapy, Health Information Systems Technician, Health Institutions Management, Social Security, Social Work, Medical Documentation and Secretariat, Medical Imaging Techniques, Medical Laboratory Techniques, Medical Promotion and Marketing, Medical and Aromatic Plants, Elderly Care)

Çarşı Campus

Faculty of Health Sciences

(Child Development, Occupational Health and Safety, Social Work, Health Management)

Çarşı Campus

Faculty of Humanities and Social Sciences

South Campus

Faculty of Communication

South Campus

Faculty of Dentistry

NP Health Campus

Faculty of Health Sciences

(Nutrition and Dietetics, Speech and Language Therapy, Midwifery, Occupational Therapy, Physiotherapy and Rehabilitation, Nursing, Audiology, Perfusion)

NP Health Campus

Vocational School of Health Services

(Oral and Dental Health, Dental Prosthesis Technology, Audiometry)

NP Health Campus

Faculty of Medicine

Faculty of Medicine NP Campus
